name: topgauge-cc
description: Provider-agnostic Claude Code statusline plugin (ToPGauge-CC) for token-plan usage and account balance. Picks the provider from ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL (currently MiniMax + DeepSeek); hides itself otherwise. Visibility of the age annotation follows a template-driven priority: if lineTemplate includes m_age it emits unconditionally (🔗 fresh / ⛓️‍💥 stale); otherwise the stale fallback appends ⛓️‍💥 X ago only when displaying cached data after a fetch failure. Falls back to 'Usage:/Balance: not available!' when no cached data exists. Composes with another statusline via the TOPGAUGE_CC_UPSTREAM_CMD env var.
